name: Morph: Morph V3 Fast
description: Morph's fastest apply model for code edits. ~10,500 tokens/sec with 96% accuracy for rapid code transformations. The model requires the prompt to be in the following format: {instruction} {initial_code} {edit_snippet} Zero Data Retention is enabled for Morph. Learn more about this model in their [documentation](https://docs.morphllm.com/quickstart)
